overall.description: A samurai character from Ghost of Tsushima walks slowly along a coastal cliff overlooking the ocean. The scene features traditional Japanese fishing structures, distant sailing ships, and a desaturated cinematic color palette with teal ocean tones and warm sandy cliffs.

agents.ego_description: standing on the cliff edge gazing out at the ocean and distant sailing ships

entered.detail: vast blue ocean stretching to the horizon with visible wave patterns
traditional wooden sailing vessels with sails visible on the horizon
large weathered rock formations along the coastline
sandy shoreline visible below the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The samurai stands on a rocky cliff overlooking the vast ocean. Distant sailing ships dot the horizon while waves crash against the coastal rocks below, and a sandy beach stretches along the shoreline.

events.description: turning to reveal wooden fishing village structures on the beach below

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the cliff edge, observing the coastal settlement below

entered.detail: traditional wooden huts and structures on the beach below the cliff
dense pine trees covering the upper cliff face

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along the cliff path, revealing a traditional fishing village with wooden huts on the beach below. A forested cliff face rises on the right while the ocean stretches to the left, and the distant ships shift to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside trail with fishing apparatus

events.description: passing by wooden scaffolding and traditional fishing nets along the cliffside

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrow cliff path past traditional bamboo fishing equipment

entered.detail: traditional bamboo poles and netting used for coastal fishing

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as the character passes traditional bamboo fishing nets and scaffolding on the left. The wooden village and forested cliff fall behind while the rocky coastline continues ahead, and the distant ships now appear on the right side of the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged coastline that transitions from a wide oceanic vista to a narrow path lined with traditional fishing structures. It begins with the samurai standing atop a rocky cliff overlooking a vast ocean where distant sailing ships dot the horizon and waves crash against a sandy shoreline. As the character begins walking along the cliff path, the perspective shifts to reveal a traditional fishing village with wooden huts nestled between the beach and a rising forested cliff face. The scene then narrows as the camera passes bamboo fishing nets and scaffolding, leaving the village and forest behind. Finally, the rocky coastline continues forward while the distant ships drift toward the right side of the horizon.
